title: Method call edge resolver with multi-round SQL-based resolution
purpose: Resolves method call edges across a database by attempting increasingly broad matching strategies to find callee methods for each call.
module_context: Exports types for resolution quality and report structure, and a main function to resolve method calls using 6 SQL rounds of decreasing specificity.

steps.content: Clean up any existing null callee references that are not already marked as ambiguous or unresolved.
Prepare the scope predicate and parameters for limiting resolution to specific files if provided.
Reset the resolution state for all method calls in the scope by clearing callee references and setting quality to unresolved.
Perform exact name matching across the entire project to resolve calls.
Resolve calls where the caller and callee are in the same file.
Resolve calls where the receiver hint matches the enclosing class of the callee.
Resolve calls where the callee is exported and in the same directory as the caller.
Resolve calls where the callee is exported and imported by the caller's file.
Mark any remaining unresolved calls as either ambiguous or unresolved based on the number of matching methods.
Aggregate counts of resolved calls by quality level and compute total edges.
Return a report summarizing the resolution results and duration.
Retrieve cached prepared statements for the database if they exist.
If no cached statements exist, prepare and cache a statement for cleaning up null callee references.
Return the cached or newly created statement set.
